tags.name: Stripe Webhook
tags.description: Live webhook receiver — signature-verified, dispatches by event type

tags.description: SGI mistake logger + readiness score

tags.description: Pre-generated lesson reminders + manual fire

tags.description: Issue + redeem one-shot email verification tokens

tags.description: Instructor profiles + multi-school attachment

tags.name: Phone Numbers
tags.description: 1..N phone numbers per owner; WhatsApp opt-in + verification

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: Per-student PDF report cards

tags.description: Anonymized new-driver risk scores + aggregate

tags.name: Dashboard
tags.description: Owner home-screen rollup

tags.description: First Car Matchmaker — parent-side intake

tags.name: Schools
tags.description: Driving-school tenants — create / read / update / deactivate

tags.description: Vehicle telemetry attached to logged mistakes

tags.description: Insurance broker leads — graduation-driven routing

tags.description: Payment ledger — manual record, mark paid, student ledger, school outstanding

tags.description: Owner-issued invitations for instructors / students / parents

tags.description: Student profiles, package tracking, and parent linkage

tags.description: Signup, login, OAuth, refresh, logout

tags.description: Dealership routing + conversion + instructor payouts

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: Lesson scheduling — book, reschedule, cancel, complete, no-show

tags.name: WhatsApp Links
tags.description: Generate wa.me click-to-chat links + click-confirm beacon (verifies recipient phone)

get.summary: Get a student by id. Scope: OWNER, assigned INSTRUCTOR, the student themselves, or a linked PARENT.

put.summary: Patch student fields. OWNER of school or assigned INSTRUCTOR.

get.summary: Get a session by id. Any participant.

put.summary: Reschedule a SCHEDULED session. Re-validates conflicts + working hours.

get.summary: Full school detail. OWNER of this school only.

put.summary: Patch school fields. OWNER of this school only.

get.summary: Get one phone number by id

put.summary: Update label, country/national number, WhatsApp flags. Owner FK is immutable.
Flip an UNPAID payment to PAID with a method + paidAt. Idempotent on already-PAID.

get.summary: Get an instructor profile by id (self or attached-school OWNER).

put.summary: Patch instructor profile (self or attached-school OWNER).

post.summary: Create a new email+password account
Exchange a refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair
Revoke a refresh token server-side
Log in with email + password
Sign in / up with a Google ID token
Redeem a verification token (public — no JWT required)
Issue (or re-issue) a verification token for the caller's email
Generate a wa.me link for a phone number; writes a whatsapp_message_log row
Beacon fired when the SPA opens the wa.me anchor — flips phone.verified_at on first click

get.summary: List telemetry events for a mistake. Same scope as attach.

post.summary: Attach a telemetry snapshot to a logged mistake. OWNER or assigned INSTRUCTOR.
Upgrade plan. Returns Stripe Checkout URL when configured; otherwise admin-mode flips inline.
Link a parent to a student (find-or-create by email).
PUBLIC. Stripe webhook receiver. Signature-verified.

get.summary: Calendar list. Required: from + to (ISO-8601 instants). OWNER must supply schoolId; PARENT must supply studentId.

post.summary: Book a new lesson. Conflict + working-hours validated. OWNER/INSTRUCTOR/STUDENT scope-aware.

get.summary: List mistakes for a session. Any participant.

post.summary: Log a mistake during a SCHEDULED or COMPLETED lesson. OWNER or assigned INSTRUCTOR.
Mark a SCHEDULED session NO_SHOW. Decrements student.lessons_remaining. OWNER or assigned INSTRUCTOR.
Mark a SCHEDULED session COMPLETED. Decrements student.lessons_remaining. OWNER or assigned INSTRUCTOR.
Cancel a SCHEDULED session. Idempotent. Any participant.
Create the OWNER's school. One school per owner.

get.summary: List students at a school. OWNER sees all; INSTRUCTOR sees only their assigned students.

post.summary: Add a student to the school. Creates the student User + Student row + optional Parent link.
Invite a student to this school. OWNER or attached INSTRUCTOR.
Invite a parent to this school (optionally pre-link to students). OWNER only.
Invite an instructor to this school. OWNER of school only.
Detach an instructor from a school (sets left_at). OWNER of school only.
Attach an instructor to a school (M:N). OWNER of school only.
Reverse a deactivate. Idempotent.
Soft-delete the school (sets is_active = false). Idempotent.
Generate (or re-generate) the anonymized risk score for a student. OWNER only.
Mark a PENDING reminder as SENT. Creates a whatsapp_message_log row. Idempotent on already-SENT.

get.summary: List phone numbers for an owner. Defaults to the caller's own user_id phones.

post.summary: Create a phone number for an owner (USER | SCHOOL | INSTRUCTOR | STUDENT)
Toggle WhatsApp opt-in for this phone
Promote this phone to primary (demotes any existing primary on the same owner)
Record a manual payment (CASH / ETRANSFER / OTHER). OWNER or assigned INSTRUCTOR.
Mark a PENDING payout as PAID. Records e-transfer ref. OWNER only.
PARENT submits the First Car Matchmaker form. One NEW lead per student (re-submit overwrites).
Mark a ROUTED lead as CONVERTED. Auto-creates instructor payout. OWNER only.
PUBLIC. Accept a TOKEN-mode invitation by setting a password.
Revoke a pending invitation. OWNER who issued only.
Generate a new token + refresh expiry. OWNER who issued only. TOKEN-mode only.
Mark a ROUTED lead as QUOTED — bounty trigger. OWNER only.
Mark a non-CONVERTED lead as DEAD (lost). OWNER only.
Mark a QUOTED lead as CONVERTED. OWNER only.
Soft-delete an instructor profile (self or attached-school OWNER).

get.summary: Get the caller's instructor profile.

post.summary: Create the caller's instructor profile (self-register).

get.summary: AV-research dataset summary (counts only). OWNER only in V1; B2B API key gate is TD.
PUBLIC. Plan catalog for the SPA's pricing page.
Caller's school's plan + limits + current monthly usage.
Generate the student's PDF report card. Same scope as readiness/ledger reads.
Compute the cumulative readiness score for a student over the last 5 sessions.
Student's full ledger — payments + summary totals.
Full mistake history for a student.
Get the caller's own student profile (role=STUDENT).
List invitations for a school. OWNER only. Filter by status optional.
List active instructors at a school. OWNER of school or any instructor at school.
All UNPAID payments at the school. OWNER of school only.
Lean projection of the caller's school. Any authenticated role.
Read a risk score by anonymized hash. OWNER only in V1; B2B API key gate is TD.
Tier-distribution aggregate across the platform. No student-level detail.
List all reminders for a session (any status). OWNER or assigned INSTRUCTOR.
List PENDING reminders for the caller (a recipient). Driver of the SPA's 'reminders to send' panel.
Get a payment by id. OWNER, assigned INSTRUCTOR, the student, or linked PARENT.
List active mistake categories for a jurisdiction (SGI/ICBC/MTO/DMV).
List all leads for a school. OWNER of school only.
PARENT lists their own submitted leads.
List payouts for an instructor. INSTRUCTOR (self) or OWNER (their school).
List active dealerships. Any authenticated role.
PUBLIC. Pre-accept landing — fetch basic invite info by token.
List insurance leads for a school. OWNER of school only.
List active insurance brokers. Any authenticated role.
Single-shot rollup for the OWNER's home screen.

delete.summary: Remove a parent link (does not delete the parent user).
